name: agent-skills-kit
description: Collection of Claude Code skills for software development.

plugins.name: ios-image-metadata
plugins.description: Reference plugin for image metadata work on iOS/macOS. Covers ImageIO APIs, EXIF, XMP, IPTC, GPS, TIFF, ICC, orientation mapping, metadata preservation, and interoperability across metadata standards and image formats.

plugins.name: ios-quick-start
plugins.description: Scaffold a new iOS app project with a clean three-layer architecture (DomainLayer, DataLayer, ViewLayer) + Shared utilities as local SPM packages, Factory for dependency injection, and Navigator for SwiftUI navigation.
